title: GTBH Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 65 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Guru Teg Bahadur Hospital (GTBH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 65 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, Post-graduation, Diploma, and DNB can apply for the GTBH Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the educational details, age limit, selection proce...
